name: Emi Noir
description: Alt-aesthetic lifestyle creator with heterochromia (green and blue eyes) who wears decorative contact lenses (cat eyes, sharingan) as a signature style. Content focuses on gym/fitness, gaming (League of Legends), and tea ceremony aesthetics. Dark feminine energy, confident but chill vibe, mix of edgy and cozy content.
video_suggestions_requirement: Do not use videos with close-up eye shots showing natural eyes without lenses. Avoid crowded group scenes without a clear main subject. No blurred or extreme low-light footage. No content unrelated to fitness, gaming, or aesthetic lifestyle. Avoid clips where the face is mostly hidden or heavily occluded.
